description: Freebox curated exercise library. Source of truth — never modified at runtime. Every entry hand-tagged with phase compatibility, equipment, and loading profile. See docs/methodology.md for the science behind these tags.

exercises.name: Front squat
cues: Full clean grip or cross grip

exercises.name: Goblet squat
cues: Elbows tucked inside knees at bottom

exercises.name: Leg press
cues: Lower back stays pinned to pad
Don't lock out at the top

exercises.name: Walking lunge
cues: Back knee approaches floor without slamming

exercises.name: Romanian deadlift
cues: Hinge at the hip, not lower back

exercises.name: Hip thrust
cues: Full hip extension at top, no overextension

exercises.name: Single-leg Romanian deadlift
cues: Floating leg in line with torso

exercises.name: Kettlebell swing
cues: Hip drive powers the swing, not the arms

exercises.name: Good morning
cues: Hinge at hip until torso parallel

exercises.name: Incline dumbbell press
cues: Elbows slightly inside the line of shoulders

exercises.name: Machine chest press
cues: Adjust seat so handles align with mid-chest

exercises.name: Seated dumbbell press
cues: Bench at vertical or slightly reclined
Lower until elbows at shoulder line

exercises.name: Push press
cues: Lock out overhead with head through

exercises.name: Pike push-up
cues: Hips piked high, body in inverted V
Stack shoulders over hands at top

exercises.name: Pendlay row
cues: Bar starts on floor every rep

exercises.name: Chest-supported dumbbell row
cues: Slight pause at top, no momentum

exercises.name: Cable seated row
cues: Tall torso, slight lean back at end-range

exercises.name: Inverted row
cues: Body in straight line, heels on floor
Lower body angle to increase difficulty

exercises.name: Pull-up
cues: Chest to bar at the top

exercises.name: Lat pulldown
cues: Pull to upper chest, not behind neck

exercises.name: Assisted pull-up
cues: Set assistance to allow strict reps in the rep range
Treat each rep like the real movement

exercises.name: Reverse lunge
cues: Step long enough that front shin is vertical
Back knee toward ground without slamming
Drive through front heel to return

exercises.name: Step-up
cues: Drive through heel, don't push off back leg
Box height at or below knee

exercises.name: Lateral lunge
cues: Sit back into hip on working side

exercises.name: Dead bug
cues: Lower back pressed to floor throughout
Opposite arm and leg extend slowly

exercises.name: Hanging leg raise
cues: Tilt pelvis back as legs rise

exercises.name: Cable woodchop
cues: Power comes from rotating hips, not arms

exercises.name: Broad jump
cues: Arms swing back, then forward to drive
Hold landing for 1 count before next rep

exercises.name: Depth jump
cues: Box height starts low (30cm), progress gradually

exercises.name: Medicine ball slam
cues: Reach high overhead with full extension

exercises.name: Medicine ball chest pass
cues: Throw to a wall or partner
Catch and reset, no rapid rebound

exercises.name: Clap push-up
cues: Clap quickly, return hands to plant
Stop set if push becomes weak

exercises.name: Dumbbell lateral raise
cues: Lead with the elbow, not the wrist

exercises.name: Leg extension
cues: Adjust seat so axis aligns with knee joint

exercises.name: Farmer's walk
cues: Tall posture, ribs stacked over hips

exercises.name: Suitcase carry
cues: Resist the side lean toward the weight

exercises.name: Glute bridge
cues: Feet flat on floor close to glutes
Full hip extension without arching lower back

exercises.name: Cossack squat
cues: Sit deep on working leg, other leg straight with toes up

exercises.name: Pistol squat (progression)
cues: Use box for assist on the way up

exercises.name: Rear-foot elevated split squat (heels-elevated)
cues: Heel slightly elevated for more quad bias

exercises.name: Single-arm dumbbell press (standing)
cues: Don't lean away from the weight
